reasoning_parser_smoke.notes: Reasoning parser splits Gemma's '*   bullet' thinking trace into reasoning_content cleanly. Content has clean math derivation. Both have the 0.05 answer.

vision.response: Please provide the image you would like me to describe.
vision.notes: DIFFERENT failure mode from Devstral/Qwen3.5: image is silently dropped at the SGLang multimodal layer (prompt_tokens=22 means no image markers reached the prompt). Root cause: mlx-community 4-bit Gemma 4 checkpoint ships without preprocessor_config.json; SGLang can't construct an image processor. The model itself correctly responds 'please provide the image' because it received only text. Architectural fix: ship preprocessor_config.json alongside the checkpoint (R9700 calibration recipe does this for new builds).
